full_text:
Chang Fang 常房
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chang Fang (常房). Killed a registrar of Zhu Bao under suspicion of rebellion, but was defamed by Zhu Bao and executed by Zhuge Liang. Chang Fang was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Chang Fang lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
